hero.headline: Software quality, engineered for delivery.
hero.subtitle: French consulting firm exclusively specialized in software testing, built around governance and KPIs.

expertises.title: Our software testing expertise
expertises.intro: Five specialized areas of intervention, integrated into an industrialized offshore delivery model.

functionalTesting.title: Functional Testing
functionalTesting.description: Design and execution of structured functional test campaigns. Exhaustive coverage of critical user journeys, rigorous defect management, full traceability.
deliverables: Test plans and acceptance test cases
Campaign execution and defect tracking
Coverage reports and quality dashboards

testAutomation.title: Test Automation
testAutomation.description: Building durable automation frameworks integrated into your CI/CD pipelines. High-value scenario selection, industrialized script maintenance.
deliverables: Custom automation framework
Scripts integrated into CI/CD pipelines
Coverage strategy and prioritization

apiTesting.title: API Testing
apiTesting.description: Systematic validation of your services and microservices. Contract, functional, and integration testing to ensure the reliability of your inter-system exchanges.
deliverables: API test strategy (contract, functional, integration)
Automated test suites per endpoint
Environment and test data management

performanceTesting.title: Performance Testing
performanceTesting.description: Load, stress, and endurance campaigns to validate your systems under pressure. Results analysis, bottleneck identification, optimization recommendations.
deliverables: Load scenarios and test protocols
Campaign execution (load, stress, endurance)
Analysis reports and recommendations

qaGovernance.title: QA Governance & KPIs
qaGovernance.description: Establishing a structured quality management framework. KPI definition, dashboard construction, reporting rituals, continuous improvement.
deliverables: KPI framework tailored to your context
Dashboards and executive reporting
Continuous improvement processes

approach.title: Our approach
approach.subtitle: An operational framework in three phases. Every engagement follows the same logic: assess, structure, deliver.

assess.title: Assess
assess.description: We audit your testing context, processes, tools, and organization. No generic diagnosis — a precise evaluation of your QA maturity.
activities: Audit of existing test processes and coverage
QA maturity assessment and gap identification
Risk mapping and technical dependency analysis
Formalization of quality objectives and success criteria
assess.outcome: A clear diagnosis of your QA maturity and a prioritized action plan.

structure.title: Structure
structure.description: We design the offshore delivery organization tailored to your needs: teams, processes, tools, governance. A setup ready to produce.
activities: Definition of offshore organization and staffing
Implementation of test frameworks and tools
Construction of governance model and KPIs
structure.outcome: A structured, equipped, and governed offshore testing setup.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.description: Our teams execute test campaigns with rigor and transparency. Continuous reporting, permanent adjustment, measurable results from the first weeks.
activities: Execution of test campaigns per validated plans
Continuous reporting and real-time tracking dashboards
Continuous improvement based on delivery metrics
deliver.outcome: Visible and measurable results, constantly improving software quality.

approach.credibility: Founded by Ahmed Ghanmi — over 10 years in software testing delivery across demanding environments.

clients.title: Trusted by industry leaders
clients.subtitle: Experience gained across major industrial and technology groups.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.intro: Need help with software testing? An offshore delivery to structure? Tell us about your context. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Select a subject

subjectHints.functionalTesting: Describe your functional testing or acceptance testing needs.
subjectHints.apiTesting: Describe your API or service testing needs.
subjectHints.performanceTesting: Describe your load or performance testing needs.
subjectHints.qaGovernance: Describe your QA governance or quality management needs.

contact.success: Thank you. We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

hero.title: ISTQB Training & Certification
hero.subtitle: Quorexis trains your teams to international software testing standards. Recognized ISTQB certifications, practitioner trainers, results-oriented approach.

certifications.title: Certifications offered
certifications.subtitle: Six ISTQB certification tracks, from foundation to specialist level.

ctfl.title: CTFL — Certified Tester Foundation Level
ctfl.description: The essential foundation of the testing profession. Master the fundamentals of software testing according to the international ISTQB syllabus.

advancedTestAnalyst.title: Advanced Test Analyst
advancedTestAnalyst.description: Deepen your test analysis skills. Advanced design techniques, review and quality risk assessment.

technicalTestAnalyst.title: Technical Test Analyst
technicalTestAnalyst.description: Master the technical aspects of testing: structural testing, static analysis, security and performance testing.

testAutomationEngineer.title: Test Automation Engineer
testAutomationEngineer.description: Design and implement robust, maintainable test automation solutions. Architecture, frameworks, best practices.

agileTester.title: Agile Tester
agileTester.description: Adapt your testing practices to an agile context. The tester's role in Scrum, exploratory testing, Definition of Done.

testManager.title: Test Manager
testManager.description: Lead your organization's test strategy. Planning, estimation, tracking, governance and continuous improvement.

theory.title: Official ISTQB syllabus
theory.description: Content 100% aligned with the current ISTQB syllabus. Each module covers the learning objectives required for certification.

caseStudies.title: Real-world case studies
caseStudies.description: Practical exercises from real projects in offshore contexts. Your teams work on scenarios they will encounter in the field.

mockExams.title: Mock exams
mockExams.description: Exam simulations under real conditions. Detailed correction and weak-point analysis to maximize pass rates.

followUp.title: Post-training support
followUp.description: 30-day post-training support. Email assistance, additional resources and Q&A session.

formats.title: Training formats
formats.subtitle: Three formats adapted to your organizational and geographic constraints.

interCompany.title: Open sessions
interCompany.description: Scheduled sessions at fixed dates, open to all. Ideal for training one or two team members.

intraCompany.title: In-company
intraCompany.description: Training dedicated to your organization, adapted to your business context and tools.

remote.title: Remote
remote.description: Video-conference training with the same pedagogical quality. Interactive and collaborative virtual classes.

practitioners.title: Practitioner trainers
practitioners.description: Our trainers are active consultants with over 10 years of experience in software testing delivery. They teach what they practice daily.

successRate.title: High pass rate
successRate.description: Our structured pedagogical approach — syllabus, practical cases, mock exams — ensures a pass rate above the market average.

offshore.title: Offshore-compatible approach
offshore.description: Our training integrates the specifics of testing in an offshore context: cross-cultural communication, collaborative tools, remote governance.

personalized.title: Personalized follow-up
personalized.description: Each participant receives 30-day individual post-training support: email assistance, additional resources, Q&A session.

cta.title: Ready to certify your teams?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a call with our team to define the training path that fits your objectives.

trainingTeaser.title: ISTQB Training & Certification
trainingTeaser.subtitle: Certify your teams to international software testing standards. Six ISTQB tracks, practitioner trainers, results-oriented approach.

blog.title: Perspectives
blog.subtitle: Insights and experience reports on offshore software testing delivery.

seo.title: Quorexis — Software Testing Delivery | Test. Trust. Deliver.
seo.description: French consultancy specializing in offshore software testing delivery. Functional testing, automation, API, performance, QA governance.
seo.trainingTitle: ISTQB Training — Quorexis | Software Testing Certification
seo.trainingDescription: ISTQB training and certifications: CTFL, Test Analyst, Test Automation Engineer, Agile Tester, Test Manager. Practitioner trainers, results-oriented approach.

common.ctaSubtitle: Schedule a call with our team to discuss your testing challenges.

landing.title: Offshore testing services, governed and KPI-driven
landing.subtitle: Quorexis delivers structured testing operations: functional, automation, API, performance and QA governance.

core.title: Core Testing
core.description: The foundation of every testing engagement.

levels.title: Testing Levels
levels.description: Structured testing at every level of the delivery chain.

landing.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your context. We'll propose a tailored approach.

functionalTesting.seoDescription: Structured functional testing campaigns with full traceability, defect management and executive reporting for offshore delivery.
functionalTesting.title: Structured Functional Testing
functionalTesting.subtitle: Coverage of critical user journeys, traceability, defect management and executive reporting.
solves: Uncontrolled regressions impacting production releases
Late and chaotic UAT sessions with unclear acceptance criteria
Defects escaping to production due to insufficient test coverage
Lack of traceability between requirements and test execution
deliverables: Test plans and acceptance test case repository
Campaign execution with structured defect triage
Coverage matrix mapped to business requirements
Weekly reports and quality dashboards
functionalTesting.assess: Audit of your current functional testing coverage, defect patterns and quality gates.
functionalTesting.structure: Design of test strategy, case repository and acceptance criteria framework.
functionalTesting.deliver: Execution of test campaigns with daily defect triage and weekly executive reporting.

testAutomation.seoDescription: ROI-driven test automation with durable frameworks, high-value scenario selection and industrialized maintenance.
testAutomation.title: ROI-Driven Test Automation
testAutomation.subtitle: Durable automation framework, high-value scenario selection, industrialized maintenance.
solves: Slow release cycles due to manual regression testing
Flaky and unmaintainable automation scripts
No clear ROI measurement on automation investment
Automation coverage gaps on critical business flows
deliverables: Automation strategy with scope and prioritization
Custom framework with conventions and quality gates
Smoke and regression suites integrated into CI/CD
Execution reports with trend analysis
testAutomation.assess: Analysis of your regression scope, release cadence and automation maturity.
testAutomation.structure: Framework architecture, script conventions and CI/CD integration design.
testAutomation.deliver: Suite development, execution monitoring and continuous maintenance.

apiTesting.seoDescription: API testing for inter-system reliability: contract validation, regression detection, integration testing and controlled test data.
apiTesting.title: API Testing for Inter-System Reliability
apiTesting.subtitle: Contract validation, API regression, integration testing and controlled test data.
solves: Silent API regressions breaking downstream consumers
No contract validation between services
Inconsistent test environments and data management
Late discovery of integration failures
deliverables: API test strategy: contract, functional and integration layers
Automated suites per endpoint with data management
Environment configuration and test data provisioning
Integration test reports and defect tracking
apiTesting.assess: Inventory of API endpoints, dependencies and current test coverage gaps.
apiTesting.structure: Test strategy per layer, environment setup and data management approach.
apiTesting.deliver: Suite execution with regression detection and integration health monitoring.

performanceTesting.seoDescription: Load, stress and endurance testing campaigns with actionable analysis and optimization recommendations before production.
performanceTesting.title: Performance Testing Before Production
performanceTesting.subtitle: Load, stress and endurance campaigns with actionable analysis and optimization recommendations.
solves: Unknown system capacity limits before production launch
Performance degradation under sustained load
Unidentified bottlenecks causing user-facing latency
No baseline metrics for capacity planning
deliverables: Load scenarios and test protocol documentation
Campaign execution: load, stress and endurance
Bottleneck analysis and optimization recommendations
Performance baseline and trend reports
performanceTesting.assess: Profiling of critical transactions, infrastructure topology and performance requirements.
performanceTesting.structure: Scenario design, tool configuration and environment preparation.
performanceTesting.deliver: Campaign execution, real-time monitoring, analysis and actionable recommendations.

qaGovernance.seoDescription: Quality management framework, reporting rituals, quality gates and data-driven decisions for offshore testing operations.
qaGovernance.title: QA Governance & KPIs
qaGovernance.subtitle: Quality management framework, reporting rituals, quality gates and data-driven decisions.
solves: No structured quality management across delivery teams
Inconsistent testing practices and undefined quality gates
Lack of visibility on software quality at executive level
Decision-making without quality data
deliverables: QA operating model tailored to your organization
KPI framework with dashboards and executive reporting
Quality gate definitions with entry and exit criteria
Continuous improvement processes and rituals
qaGovernance.assess: Audit of current QA practices, governance gaps and reporting maturity.
qaGovernance.structure: Design of operating model, KPI framework and reporting cadence.
qaGovernance.deliver: Implementation of dashboards, quality gates and improvement cycles.

accessibilityTesting.seoDescription: WCAG compliance validation, inclusive design review and accessibility audit reporting for offshore testing delivery.
accessibilityTesting.title: Accessibility Testing
accessibilityTesting.subtitle: WCAG compliance validation, inclusive design review and accessibility audit reporting.
solves: Non-compliance with WCAG and legal accessibility requirements
Exclusion of users with disabilities from critical workflows
Accessibility regressions introduced during development
No structured approach to inclusive quality
deliverables: Accessibility audit against WCAG 2.1 AA standards
Detailed findings with severity and remediation guidance
Assistive technology compatibility testing
Accessibility compliance report and action plan
accessibilityTesting.assess: Evaluation of current accessibility posture and compliance gaps.
accessibilityTesting.structure: Test scope definition per WCAG criteria and assistive technology matrix.
accessibilityTesting.deliver: Audit execution, finding documentation and remediation tracking.

exploratoryTesting.seoDescription: Skilled exploratory testing to uncover hidden defects beyond scripted test cases in offshore testing delivery.
exploratoryTesting.title: Exploratory Testing
exploratoryTesting.subtitle: Session-based exploration to uncover defects that scripted testing misses.
solves: Critical defects escaping scripted test coverage
Insufficient understanding of real user behavior and edge cases
Over-reliance on predefined test cases with blind spots
Lack of structured approach to unscripted testing
deliverables: Session-based test charters and exploration plans
Defect reports with detailed reproduction steps
Risk and heuristic-based coverage maps
Exploration session debrief reports
exploratoryTesting.assess: Review of existing test coverage gaps and areas of highest business risk.
exploratoryTesting.structure: Design of exploration charters, session structure and heuristic guides.
exploratoryTesting.deliver: Execution of time-boxed exploration sessions with real-time defect reporting.

regressionTesting.seoDescription: Systematic regression testing to verify that changes have not broken existing functionality in offshore delivery.
regressionTesting.title: Regression Testing
regressionTesting.subtitle: Systematic verification that changes have not broken existing functionality.
solves: Recurring regressions introduced by new releases
Growing regression scope with no prioritization strategy
Manual regression cycles delaying release timelines
Lack of visibility on regression risk per release
deliverables: Regression test suite with risk-based prioritization
Execution schedules aligned to release cadence
Regression impact analysis per change set
Trend reports on regression stability over time
regressionTesting.assess: Analysis of regression history, defect recurrence patterns and release impact areas.
regressionTesting.structure: Design of regression suite, prioritization model and execution strategy.
regressionTesting.deliver: Execution of regression cycles with defect tracking and trend analysis.

uatSystemTesting.seoDescription: Structured UAT and system testing for business acceptance, ensuring stakeholder confidence before go-live.
uatSystemTesting.title: UAT & System Testing
uatSystemTesting.subtitle: Structured acceptance and system testing to secure business sign-off before go-live.
solves: Chaotic UAT sessions with unclear scope and criteria
Business stakeholders unable to validate effectively
System-level defects discovered too late in the cycle
No formal acceptance process or sign-off framework
deliverables: UAT strategy with acceptance criteria and scope definition
Business scenario test cases aligned to user workflows
System test plans covering end-to-end functionality
Acceptance reports with sign-off documentation
uatSystemTesting.assess: Review of business requirements, stakeholder expectations and current acceptance processes.
uatSystemTesting.structure: Design of UAT framework, acceptance criteria and stakeholder engagement plan.
uatSystemTesting.deliver: Facilitation of UAT sessions, defect management and formal sign-off process.

compatibilityTesting.seoDescription: Cross-browser, cross-device and cross-OS compatibility testing for consistent user experience across platforms.
compatibilityTesting.title: Compatibility Testing
compatibilityTesting.subtitle: Cross-browser, cross-device and cross-OS validation for consistent user experience.
solves: Inconsistent behavior across browsers and browser versions
Device-specific defects impacting user segments
No structured compatibility matrix for testing scope
Late discovery of platform-specific rendering issues
deliverables: Compatibility matrix covering browsers, devices and OS versions
Cross-platform test execution and defect reports
Visual and functional consistency validation
Platform-specific defect analysis and recommendations
compatibilityTesting.assess: Analysis of user analytics, target platforms and current compatibility coverage.
compatibilityTesting.structure: Design of compatibility matrix, device lab strategy and test scope.
compatibilityTesting.deliver: Execution of compatibility campaigns across defined platform matrix.

qaAudit.seoDescription: Independent assessment of QA practices, processes and maturity level for offshore testing operations.
qaAudit.title: QA Audit
qaAudit.subtitle: Independent assessment of your testing practices, processes and organizational maturity.
solves: No objective view of current QA maturity and gaps
Testing practices that evolved without governance
Inability to benchmark against industry standards
Unclear priorities for QA improvement investment
deliverables: QA maturity assessment across all testing dimensions
Gap analysis with severity and impact classification
Benchmarking against industry best practices
Prioritized improvement roadmap with actionable recommendations
qaAudit.assess: Interviews, documentation review and process observation across QA functions.
qaAudit.structure: Maturity model application, gap classification and recommendation formulation.
qaAudit.deliver: Audit report presentation, roadmap discussion and implementation guidance.

testStrategy.seoDescription: Design of test strategy and QA operating model for complex programs and offshore testing delivery.
testStrategy.title: Test Strategy & Operating Model
testStrategy.subtitle: Design of your test strategy and QA operating model for complex delivery programs.
solves: No overarching test strategy across delivery teams
Inconsistent testing approaches between projects
Undefined roles, responsibilities and governance structure
Testing efforts disconnected from business risk
deliverables: Test strategy document aligned to program objectives
QA operating model with roles and governance
Tool and environment strategy recommendations
Implementation plan with milestones and success criteria
testStrategy.assess: Discovery of program context, delivery constraints and quality objectives.
testStrategy.structure: Strategy design, operating model definition and stakeholder alignment.
testStrategy.deliver: Strategy document delivery, implementation support and governance setup.

smokeTesting.seoDescription: Quick validation of critical paths after deployments to confirm build stability and readiness for further testing.
smokeTesting.title: Smoke Testing
smokeTesting.subtitle: Quick validation of critical paths after each deployment to confirm build stability.
solves: Unstable builds progressing to full test cycles
Wasted effort testing on broken deployments
No fast feedback loop after environment deployments
Late discovery of deployment-breaking issues
deliverables: Smoke test suite covering critical application paths
Automated or manual execution playbooks per environment
Build stability reports with pass/fail criteria
Integration with deployment pipeline notifications
smokeTesting.assess: Identification of critical paths and deployment failure patterns.
smokeTesting.structure: Smoke suite design, execution triggers and reporting integration.
smokeTesting.deliver: Smoke execution after each deployment with immediate status reporting.
kpis: Time saved on failed build testing

systemTesting.seoDescription: End-to-end system validation before UAT, covering functional, non-functional and integration aspects.
systemTesting.title: System Testing
systemTesting.subtitle: End-to-end system validation before UAT, covering all functional and non-functional aspects.
solves: Gaps between component testing and user acceptance
System-level defects discovered during UAT or production
No structured approach to end-to-end validation
Insufficient coverage of system interactions and workflows
deliverables: System test plan with end-to-end scenario coverage
Functional and non-functional test case execution
System integration validation reports
Defect reports with system-level impact analysis
systemTesting.assess: Review of system architecture, integration points and business workflow coverage.
systemTesting.structure: System test strategy, scenario design and environment requirements.
systemTesting.deliver: Full system test execution with defect management and readiness assessment.

integrationTesting.seoDescription: Verification of component interactions, data flows and system integration points for reliable software delivery.
integrationTesting.title: Integration Testing
integrationTesting.subtitle: Verification of component interactions, data flows and system integration points.
solves: Integration failures discovered late in the delivery cycle
Data inconsistencies between connected systems
No structured approach to validating component interfaces
Silent failures in asynchronous communication channels
deliverables: Integration test strategy covering all system interfaces
Test cases for data flows and component interactions
Integration environment setup and configuration
Integration health reports and defect tracking
integrationTesting.assess: Mapping of system interfaces, data flows and integration dependencies.
integrationTesting.structure: Integration test strategy, environment setup and data management approach.
integrationTesting.deliver: Integration test execution with continuous monitoring and defect resolution.

uat.seoDescription: UAT facilitation and management ensuring structured business validation and stakeholder sign-off.
uat.title: User Acceptance Testing
uat.subtitle: Structured business validation ensuring stakeholder confidence and formal sign-off.
solves: Unstructured UAT with no clear entry or exit criteria
Business users struggling to validate without guidance
Acceptance defects blocking go-live decisions
No traceability between business requirements and acceptance tests
deliverables: UAT plan with entry criteria, scope and timeline
Business scenario scripts aligned to user workflows
Facilitation of UAT sessions with business stakeholders
Acceptance report with formal sign-off documentation
uat.assess: Analysis of business requirements and stakeholder readiness for acceptance testing.
uat.structure: UAT plan design, scenario preparation and stakeholder briefing.
uat.deliver: UAT session facilitation, defect triage and formal acceptance process.

webTesting.subtitle: Comprehensive quality assurance for web applications across browsers, devices and user journeys.

webTesting.assess: Analysis of web application architecture, user journeys and browser usage analytics.
webTesting.structure: Test strategy design, browser matrix definition and environment setup.

mobileTesting.seoDescription: Mobile app testing across devices, OS versions and network conditions for reliable mobile experiences.

industries.seoDescription: Offshore software testing tailored to industry constraints: fintech, telecom, IoT, travel and healthcare.
industries.title: Industries
industries.subtitle: QA operations adapted to sector-specific risks, compliance and business constraints.

fintech.title: Fintech & Banking
fintech.description: Regulated environments demand rigorous testing. We validate transaction flows, security protocols and compliance requirements.
challenges: Regulatory compliance and audit trail requirements

telecom.title: Telecom & Communications

Large-scale regression impact from frequent releases

iot.title: Industrial & IoT
iot.description: Connected devices and embedded systems require specialized testing approaches for reliability and safety.
challenges: Sensor data accuracy and edge case handling
Safety and reliability under adverse conditions
focus: Sensor data accuracy and boundary testing

travel.title: Travel & Hospitality
travel.description: Booking engines, distribution systems and customer-facing platforms demand seamless experiences under variable load.

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Patient safety and data privacy require meticulous testing of clinical systems, patient portals and data exchanges.
challenges: Patient data privacy and HIPAA/GDPR compliance
Audit trail and data integrity requirements
focus: Clinical workflow and patient safety testing

points.title: Testing-only focus

points.title: Measurable results
